endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/pricings
endpoints.description: Security pricing configurations in the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/pricings/{pricingName}
endpoints.description: Security pricing configuration in the subscriptionSecurity pricing configuration in the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRICINGNAME}} with a real pricingname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/pricings/{pricingName}
endpoints.description: Security pricing configuration in the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRICINGNAME}} with a real pricingname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/pricings
endpoints.description: Security pricing configurations in the resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Security/pricings/{pricingName}
